response.subject: add secure file permissions for configuration files
response.body: Implement secure file permissions (0o600) for configuration files to prevent unauthorized access. Remove credential logging to prevent security exposure. This ensures that sensitive configuration data including AWS credentials are protected from other users on the system.

formatted_message:
feat(config): add secure file permissions for configuration files

Implement secure file permissions (0o600) for configuration files to prevent
unauthorized access. Remove credential logging to prevent security exposure.
This ensures that sensitive configuration data including AWS credentials are
protected from other users on the system.

Ticket: DEVO-456
